base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sword_beam_effect — a effect_layer from 1986 legend of zelda. rotating diamond/cross shape. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame sword-beam projectile — rotating diamond/cross shape; fires from sword-tip when Link at full HP. One of the most iconic mechanics
